pageDescription: Estimate your pension benefits based on salary and years of service for comprehensive retirement income planning

definition.title: Pension Definition
definition.description: Defined benefit retirement plan that provides regular payments based on salary and years of service

vesting.title: Vesting Requirements
vesting.description: Most pensions require 5-10 years of service to become fully vested

formula.title: Benefit Calculation
formula.description: Typically calculated as: Years of Service × Multiplier × Average Salary

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides pension benefit estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual benefits may vary based on plan rules and employer policies

importantNotesList: Pension benefits are typically guaranteed by the Pension Benefit Guaranty Corporation (PBGC)
Consider survivor benefits and benefit payment options
Pensions provide lifetime income but may not keep pace with inflation
Some pensions offer lump sum buyout options

messages.enterInformation: Enter your pension information to estimate benefits
messages.resultMessage: Your pension benefit calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides pension benefit estimates based on general formulas. Actual benefits may vary based on plan rules, employer policies, and other factors not included in these estimates.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized pension benefit analysis and retirement planning, consult pension plan administrators or financial advisors with expertise in retirement income planning and individual circumstances.

errors.currentAge: Please enter a valid current age
errors.retirementAge: Please enter a valid planned retirement age
errors.yearsOfService: Please enter valid years of service
errors.currentSalary: Please enter a valid current annual salary
errors.averageSalary: Please enter a valid average salary
errors.multiplier: Please enter a valid multiplier percentage
errors.costOfLivingAdjustment: Please enter a valid COLA percentage

tooltips.retirementAge: Age when you plan to retire and begin receiving pension benefits
tooltips.yearsOfService: Total years of employment with pension-eligible employer
tooltips.averageSalary: Average of highest earning years used in pension calculation
tooltips.additionalBenefits: Any additional pension benefits or supplements

expected_age_at_death_for_calculation_pu: Expected age at death for calculation purposes
expected_annual_return_on_lump_sum_inves: Expected annual return on lump sum investment
cost_of_living_adjustment_annual_pension: Cost of Living Adjustment - annual pension increase
percentage_of_pension_spouse_receives_af: Percentage of pension spouse receives after your death
enter_your_pension_information_to_see_yo: Enter your pension information to see your results
all_pension_streams_are_converted_to_pre: All pension streams are converted to present value using the formula:
accounts_for_two_phases_payments_while_b:
Accounts for two phases: payments while both spouses are alive, then survivor benefits until the
                        surviving spouse's death.
compares_present_values_accounting_for_d:
Compares present values accounting for delayed retirement and different pension amounts,
                        discounted back to today.
